allow: PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; foreach \($f in '3-1-11t.png','3-1-8t.png','3-1-3t.png','3-1-4t.png'\) { $p = "C:\\MediaRoot\\src2\\kyoshizawa\\kywiki2\\FEXICS\\関連資料_md\\CAFIS_03_BasicConnect\\img\\$f"; if \(Test-Path $p\) { $img = [System.Drawing.Image]::FromFile\($p\); \('{0}: {1} x {2}' -f $f, $img.Width, $img.Height\); $img.Dispose\(\) } else { \('{0}: NOT FOUND' -f $f\) } })
